title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Union Bank of India Ventures Solutions - 2026 Batch
company: Union Bank of India Ventures Solutions

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Union Bank of India Ventures Solutions - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Union Bank of India Ventures Solutions invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Risk Analyst at our Noida location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Union Bank of India Ventures Solutions:
Union Bank of India Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Union Bank of India Ventures Solutions!
